keyPoints: Took charge of several key features in the ShotArc application.
Developed the cloud infrastructure required to host the application on AWS.
Integrated 3rd party emailing services into the app to streamline secure and intuitive verification and password management.
Automated critical business processes using UiPath RPA, reducing manual effort and improving operational efficiency.
Designed and developed attended and unattended automations deployed on cloud infrastructure.
Built and refined AI agents capable of complex reasoning to automate decision-making and streamline business operations.
